sentences.target: On paie le loyer ce mois-ci.
sentences.reading: /ɔ̃ pɛ lə lwaje sə mwa si/

translations.fr: On paie le loyer ce mois-ci.
translations.ipa: /ɔ̃ pɛ lə lwaje sə mwa si/
translations.en: We pay the rent this month.
translations.de: Wir zahlen die Miete diesen Monat.
translations.ru: Мы платим аренду в этом месяце.
translations.he: אנחנו משלמים את שכר הדירה החודש.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi trả tiền thuê nhà tháng này.
translations.nl: We betalen de huur deze maand.
translations.hu: Ebben a hónapban fizetjük a lakbért.
translations.hi: हम इस महीने किराया भरते हैं.
translations.el: Πληρώνουμε το ενοίκιο αυτόν τον μήνα.
translations.sv: Vi betalar hyran den här månaden.
translations.ja: 今月は家賃を払います。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun (3rd person singular in form, often used colloquially for ‘we’); subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person singular) agreeing with ‘On’.
Definite article, masculine singular, introduces the noun ‘loyer’.
Common noun, masculine singular; direct object of ‘paie’.
Demonstrative determiner modifying ‘mois’ in the temporal phrase.
Common noun, masculine (invariable in number); head of the temporal NP.
Deictic particle (written with hyphen) specifying proximity in ‘ce mois-ci’ (‘this month’).

sentences.target: Je prends un rendez-vous le mois prochain.
sentences.reading: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ œ̃ ʁɑ̃dezvu lə mwa pʁɔʃɛ̃/

translations.fr: Je prends un rendez-vous le mois prochain.
translations.ipa: /ʒə pʁɑ̃ œ̃ ʁɑ̃dezvu lə mwa pʁɔʃɛ̃/
translations.en: I'm making an appointment next month.
translations.es: Voy a pedir una cita el mes que viene.
translations.de: Ich vereinbare nächsten Monat einen Termin.
translations.it: Prendo un appuntamento il mese prossimo.
translations.ru: Я запишусь на приём в следующем месяце.
translations.pt: Vou marcar um compromisso no próximo mês.
translations.vi: Tôi đặt lịch hẹn vào tháng sau.
translations.nl: Ik maak volgende maand een afspraak.
translations.uk: Я записуюся на прийом наступного місяця.
translations.hi: मैं अगले महीने अपॉइंटमेंट तय कर रहा हूँ.
translations.pl: Umawiam się na wizytę w przyszłym miesiącu.
translations.sv: Jag bokar en tid nästa månad.
translations.ro: Îmi fac o programare luna viitoare.
translations.da: Jeg laver en aftale i næste måned.

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person singular; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person singular).
Indefinite article, masculine singular, introduces ‘rendez-vous’.
Compound common noun, masculine; direct object of ‘prends’.
Definite article, masculine singular, part of the temporal NP.
Common noun, masculine (invariable); head of ‘le mois’.
Adjective, post-nominal, modifies ‘mois’ to indicate future time (‘next month’).

sentences.target: Les soldes durent tout le mois.

translations.fr: Les soldes durent tout le mois.
translations.es: Las rebajas duran todo el mes.
translations.de: Die Sonderangebote laufen den ganzen Monat.
translations.it: I saldi durano tutto il mese.
translations.zh-Hans: 促销活动持续整整一个月。
translations.yue: 減價活動會持續成個月。
translations.pt: As promoções duram o mês inteiro.
translations.vi: Các chương trình giảm giá kéo dài suốt cả tháng.
translations.nl: De uitverkoop duurt de hele maand.
translations.hi: छूट पूरे महीने जारी रहती है.
translations.el: Οι εκπτώσεις διαρκούν όλον τον μήνα.
translations.ja: セールは一か月間続きます。

tokens.explanation: Definite article, plural; introduces the plural noun ‘soldes’.
Common noun, plural; subject of the verb ‘durent’.
Main verb, present indicative (3rd person plural) agreeing with ‘Les soldes’.
Quantifying determiner meaning ‘the whole’ modifying ‘mois’.
Definite article, masculine singular; part of the NP ‘le mois’.
Common noun, masculine (invariable); head of the duration NP ‘tout le mois’.

sentences.target: Nous mettons de côté chaque mois pour les vacances.
sentences.reading: /nu mɛtɔ̃ də kote ʃak mwa puʁ le vakɑ̃s/

translations.fr: Nous mettons de côté chaque mois pour les vacances.
translations.ipa: /nu mɛtɔ̃ də kote ʃak mwa puʁ le vakɑ̃s/
translations.en: We put money aside every month for vacation.
translations.es: Ahorramos dinero cada mes para las vacaciones.
translations.de: Wir legen jeden Monat Geld für den Urlaub zurück.
translations.it: Mettiamo da parte soldi ogni mese per le vacanze.
translations.ko: 휴가를 위해 매달 돈을 따로 모아 둡니다.
translations.zh-Hans: 我们每个月都为度假存钱。
translations.yue: 我哋每個月都為度假儲錢。
translations.ru: Мы откладываем деньги каждый месяц на отпуск.
translations.pt: Guardamos dinheiro todos os meses para as férias.
translations.he: אנחנו חוסכים כסף בכל חודש לחופשה.
translations.tr: Tatil için her ay para bir kenara koyuyoruz.
translations.vi: Chúng tôi để dành tiền mỗi tháng cho kỳ nghỉ.
translations.ar: نضع المال جانبًا كل شهر من أجل العطلة.
translations.nl: We zetten elke maand geld opzij voor de vakantie.
translations.uk: Ми відкладаємо гроші щомісяця на відпустку.
translations.hu: Minden hónapban félreteszünk pénzt a nyaralásra.
translations.hi: हम छुट्टियों के लिए हर महीने पैसे अलग रखते हैं.
translations.pl: Odkładamy co miesiąc pieniądze na wakacje.
translations.el: Βάζουμε χρήματα στην άκρη κάθε μήνα για τις διακοπές.
translations.nb: Vi legger penger til side hver måned til ferien.
translations.id: Kami menyisihkan uang setiap bulan untuk liburan.
translations.sv: Vi lägger undan pengar varje månad till semestern.
translations.ro: Punem bani deoparte în fiecare lună pentru vacanță.
translations.cs: Každý měsíc si odkládáme peníze na dovolenou.
translations.da: Vi lægger penge til side hver måned til ferien.
translations.fi: Laitamme joka kuukausi rahaa sivuun lomaa varten.
translations.ja: 毎月、休暇のためにお金を取っておきます。

tokens.explanation: Subject pronoun, 1st person plural; subject of the verb.
Main verb, present indicative (1st person plural).
Preposition; with ‘côté’ forms the fixed adverbial expression ‘de côté’ (‘aside’).
Common noun; part of the fixed expression ‘de côté’ functioning adverbially.
Distributive determiner modifying ‘mois’ (‘each month’).
Common noun, masculine (invariable); head of the temporal NP.
Preposition introducing a purpose/complement NP (‘for the holidays’).
Definite article, plural; introduces ‘vacances’.
Common noun, plural-only; object of the preposition ‘pour’.
